payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Bottom portion of a light-painted rectangular picture frame with a thin molded profile and reflective glass revealing a pale blue image inside; the frame is edge-cropped (bottom/foreground visible) and appears intact, photographed at approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"light-painted picture frame bottom edge","long_description":"Bottom portion of a light-painted rectangular picture frame with a thin molded profile and reflective glass revealing a pale blue image inside; the frame is edge-cropped (bottom/foreground visible) and appears intact, photographed at approximately 1.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["light beige/white painted finish","thin molded frame profile","reflective glass surface","pale blue artwork visible inside","rectangular horizontal orientation","bottom edge cropped/partial view","appears intact"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
